docs.text: NONEVIM Plugins Here I show all the plugins in my neovim configurations they are sorted to 3 categories: UI LSP Functionality
docs.title: NONEVIM Plugins

docs.text: Here I show all the plugins in my neovim configurations they are sorted to 3 categories: UI LSP Functionality
docs.title: NONEVIM Plugins

docs.text: Functionality / Productivity Plugins These plugins enhance workflow efficiency, terminal usage, searching, and code execution. toggleterm.nvim Terminal manager inside Neovim. Purpose Provides floating, horizontal, or vertical terminal windows. Features Toggle terminal with keybindings Multiple terminal instances Floating terminal mode telescope.nvim Fuzzy finder framework. Purpose Powerful searching interface for files, buffers, and content. Dependencies plenary.nvim Features File picker Live grep Buffer search Extensible pickers which-key.nvim Keybinding helper UI. Purpose Displays available keybindings after partial input. Features Interactive keybinding hints Grouped shortcuts Lazy-loaded on key press code_runner.nvim Code execution plugin. Purpose Run code snippets or files directly from Neovim. Features Multi-language support Quick execution of scripts Custom command mapping
docs.title: Functionality / Productivity Plugins

docs.text: These plugins enhance workflow efficiency, terminal usage, searching, and code execution.

docs.text: LSP & Development Plugins This section covers Neovim plugins responsible for language intelligence, code completion, formatting, and syntax parsing. neovim/nvim-lspconfig Official LSP configuration layer for Neovim. Purpose Provides prebuilt configurations for Language Server Protocol (LSP) servers. Features Easy setup for language servers Standardized configuration interface Works with nvim-lsp-installer or manual LSP setup Notes Core dependency for any LSP-based workflow nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter Advanced syntax highlighting and code parsing engine. Purpose Uses Tree-sitter to provide precise syntax parsing instead of regex-based highlighting. Features Fast and incremental parsing Better highlighting accuracy Code folding and structure awareness Build :TSUpdate hrsh7th/nvim-cmp Completion engine for Neovim. Purpose Provides an extensible autocompletion framework. Dependencies cmp-nvim-lsp cmp-buffer cmp-path cmp-cmdline cmp-nvim-lsp-signature-help lspkind.nvim Features LSP-based completion Buffer and filesystem completion Command-line completion Snippet integration support (external) stevearc/conform.nvim Lightweight formatting manager. Purpose Handles code formatting using external formatters. Features Declarative formatter configuration Supports multiple formatters per filetype Async formatting support
docs.title: LSP & Development Plugins

docs.text: This section covers Neovim plugins responsible for language intelligence, code completion, formatting, and syntax parsing.

docs.text: UI / Appearance Plugins Plugins that enhance Neovim's visual experience and interface usability. catppuccin/nvim Color scheme plugin. Purpose Provides a modern pastel-themed color palette. Features Multiple flavor variants Highly customizable UI highlights Supports Lualine, Treesitter, Telescope askfiy/visual_studio_code VSCode-inspired theme. Purpose Emulates Visual Studio Code appearance. nvim-mini/mini.indentscope Indentation visualization. Purpose Highlights indentation scope for better code structure readability. Features Animated indent guides Minimal overhead Djancyp/better-comments.nvim Enhanced comment highlighting. Purpose Improves readability of TODO, FIXME, and NOTE comments. MeanderingProgrammer/render-markdown.nvim Markdown rendering inside Neovim. Purpose Improves markdown readability with inline rendering. nvim-tree/nvim-web-devicons File icons for Neovim UI plugins. Purpose Adds file-type icons across UI components. nvim-lualine/lualine.nvim Statusline plugin. Purpose Customizable and fast statusline replacement. Features Theme support Git integration Diagnostics display norcalli/nvim-colorizer.lua Color preview plugin. Purpose Displays actual colors for hex/RGB values in code. nvim-neo-tree/neo-tree.nvim File explorer UI. Purpose Modern tree-based file manager. Dependencies plenary.nvim nui.nvim nvim-web-devicons Features Git integration Floating and docked modes Fast navigation akinsho/bufferline.nvim Buffer tab UI. Purpose Shows open buffers in a tab-like interface. Features Buffer grouping Icons support Integration with devicons
